name: Preschool
description: Early childhood education. Learning through play, basic social skills, and creativity.

name: Middle School
description: Foundational education covering mathematics, language, science, and social studies.

name: Humanities High School
description: Focus on literature, history, philosophy, languages, and the arts.

name: Science High School
description: Focus on mathematics, physics, chemistry, biology, and technology.

name: Law Degree
description: Study of legal systems, jurisprudence, constitutional law, and legal practice.

name: Literature Degree
description: Study of literary works, creative writing, literary theory, and cultural analysis.

name: History Degree
description: Study of historical events, civilizations, historiography, and archival research.

name: Computer Science Degree
description: Study of algorithms, data structures, software engineering, and computation theory.

name: Engineering Degree
description: Study of mechanical, electrical, and structural engineering principles and design.

name: Medicine Degree
description: Study of human anatomy, physiology, pathology, and clinical medicine.

name: Constitutional Law
description: Advanced study of constitutional frameworks, human rights, and judicial review.

name: International Law
description: Advanced study of treaties, international courts, and cross-border legal systems.

name: Creative Writing
description: Advanced study of fiction, poetry, and narrative craft with workshop-based learning.

name: Comparative Literature
description: Advanced study of literary traditions across cultures, translation theory, and criticism.

name: Ancient History
description: Advanced study of ancient civilizations, archaeology, and classical texts.

name: Modern History
description: Advanced study of modern political movements, wars, and contemporary societies.

name: Artificial Intelligence
description: Advanced study of machine learning, neural networks, and intelligent systems.

name: Cybersecurity
description: Advanced study of network security, cryptography, and threat analysis.

name: Robotics
description: Advanced study of autonomous systems, control theory, and mechatronics.

name: Civil Engineering
description: Advanced study of structural design, urban planning, and infrastructure systems.

name: Surgery
description: Advanced specialization in surgical techniques, anatomy, and operative procedures.

name: Neuroscience
description: Advanced study of the nervous system, brain function, and neurological disorders.

name: PhD in Constitutional Law
description: Doctoral research on constitutional theory, rights frameworks, and judicial systems.

name: PhD in International Law
description: Doctoral research on international legal frameworks, diplomacy, and global governance.

name: PhD in Creative Writing
description: Doctoral research combining original literary work with critical literary analysis.

name: PhD in Comparative Literature
description: Doctoral research on cross-cultural literary analysis and translation studies.

name: PhD in Ancient History
description: Doctoral research on ancient civilizations using archaeological and textual evidence.

name: PhD in Modern History
description: Doctoral research on modern political, social, and economic historical developments.

name: PhD in Machine Learning
description: Doctoral research on learning algorithms, statistical models, and data science.

name: PhD in Security Systems
description: Doctoral research on advanced cryptography, zero-trust architectures, and threat modeling.

name: PhD in Autonomous Systems
description: Doctoral research on self-driving vehicles, drone navigation, and robotic autonomy.

name: PhD in Structural Engineering
description: Doctoral research on advanced materials, seismic design, and structural optimization.

name: PhD in Surgical Innovation
description: Doctoral research on minimally invasive techniques, robotic surgery, and transplant science.

name: PhD in Cognitive Neuroscience
description: Doctoral research on brain-behavior relationships, neuroimaging, and cognitive processes.
